meta.summary: Subread command-line suite for read alignment, featureCounts read summarization, junction-aware alignment, long-read alignment, and ExactSNP.
meta.description: Subread command-line suite for read alignment, featureCounts read summarization, junction-aware alignment, long-read alignment, and ExactSNP.

test: subread-align -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Subread-align v2.1.1' >/dev/null && featureCounts -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'featureCounts v2.1.1' >/dev/null && subjunc -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Subjunc v2.1.1' >/dev/null

subread-align -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'subread-align' >/dev/null && subread-buildindex -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'subread-buildindex' >/dev/null && featureCounts -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'featureCounts' >/dev/null && exactSNP -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'exactSNP' >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v subread-align)" | grep -F 'libz' >/dev/null && ldd "$(command -v featureCounts)" | grep -F 'libz' >/dev/null && ! ldd "$(command -v subread-align)" | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-subread-featurecounts && cd /tmp/taf-subread-featurecounts && featureCounts -p -a /opt/subread/test/featureCounts/data/test-minimum.GTF -o counts.txt /opt/subread/test/featureCounts/data/test-minimum.sam >/tmp/taf-subread-featurecounts/run.log 2>&1 && test -s counts.txt && test -s counts.txt.summary && grep -F 'Geneid' counts.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'Assigned' counts.txt.summary >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-subread-align && cd /tmp/taf-subread-align && subread-buildindex -o small /opt/subread/test/chr901.fa >/tmp/taf-subread-align/index.log 2>&1 && test -s small.00.b.array && subread-align --SAMoutput -t0 -P6 -i small -r /opt/subread/test/subread-align/data/test-noerror-r1.fq -o aln.sam -H -J >/tmp/taf-subread-align/align.log 2>&1 && test -s aln.sam && grep -F '@PG' aln.sam >/dev/null && grep -F 'subread-align' aln.sam >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-subread-subjunc && cd /tmp/taf-subread-subjunc && subread-buildindex -o small /opt/subread/test/chr901.fa >/tmp/taf-subread-subjunc/index.log 2>&1 && subjunc --SAMoutput -i small -o junctions.sam -r /opt/subread/test/subjunc/data/junction-reads-A.fq -R /opt/subread/test/subjunc/data/junction-reads-B.fq >/tmp/taf-subread-subjunc/subjunc.log 2>&1 && test -s junctions.sam && grep -F '@PG' junctions.sam >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-subread-exactsnp && cd /tmp/taf-subread-exactsnp && exactSNP -g /opt/subread/test/chr901.fa -o out.vcf -i /opt/subread/test/exactSNP/data/test-in.BAM -b >/tmp/taf-subread-exactsnp/exactsnp.log 2>&1 && test -s out.vcf && grep -F '#CHROM' out.vcf >/dev/null

upstream.name: Subread
upstream.citation: Liao, Smyth and Shi 2013 for Subread/Subjunc; Liao, Smyth and Shi 2014 for featureCounts; Liao, Smyth and Shi 2019 for Rsubread/Subread RNA-seq workflows
